title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for real-world events after years of regulatory battles, eventually reaching a $22 billion valuation. The founders sued the government regulator overseeing them and scaled to millions of customers and billions in volume. The company is positioned as infrastructure for prediction markets, framed as a "market for truth" rather than a casino.
